abilities.name: swift-swim
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during rain. This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: hydration
abilities.shortEffect: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
abilities.flavorText: Cures the Pokémon's status conditions in rain.

abilities.name: water-absorb
abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Water-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it. Water moves will ignore this Pokémon's Substitute.
abilities.flavorText: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
